description_long: This is an ornate, multi-armed candelabrum made of metal, likely brass or bronze, with a classic antique finish. The structure features a central stem with decorative scrollwork and five candle holders arranged symmetrically at the top, each with a shallow dish to catch wax drips. The base is wide and circular, providing stability, and the stem is adorned with turned details and a decorative finial at the top. The arms curve outward gracefully, each ending in a candle cup, and the overall design is both elegant and functional. The surface has a matte, slightly aged patina, suggesting it is intended for decorative use in upscale or historical urban settings. No candles, flames, or wax drips are present in the holders.
description: An ornate, antique-style metal candelabrum with five candle holders and decorative scrollwork, finished in a matte bronze tone. The wide circular base and elegant arms make it suitable for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the left side of the candelabrum, showing three candle holders prominently and the decorative scrollwork on the arms.
description_view_1: The front view displays all five candle holders symmetrically, with the central stem and ornate finial clearly visible.
description_view_2: This angled view emphasizes the right side, revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth of the candle holder arrangement.
description_view_3: A nearly direct frontal view, showing the full symmetry of the candelabrum and the detailed base and stem.
